title: MigrateContextOutput
description: Output of 'migrate context'. Assembles all deterministic context needed for dbt model generation.

table.description: Normalised FQN of the target table (schema.name).

writer.description: Normalised FQN of the writer procedure.

needs_llm.description: True when the procedure catalog mode is 'llm_required'.

profile.description: Profile section from the table catalog.

statements.description: Resolved statement list from the procedure catalog.

proc_body.description: Full SQL body of the writer procedure.

columns.description: Column definitions for the target table.

source_tables.description: Normalised FQNs of tables and views read by the writer procedure.

source_columns.description: Column metadata keyed by source FQN. Populated from catalog/tables/ or catalog/views/ (whichever exists). Empty list when neither catalog file is present.

schema_tests.description: Derived dbt schema test specs (entity_integrity, referential_integrity, recency, pii). Empty object when no tests apply.

refactored_sql.description: Refactored SQL from the procedure catalog refactor section. Null when not yet refactored.
